title: FinancialTransactionTypeValues
description: A classification of Financial Transactions (business events) used in banking systems.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pricing Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Calculates prices, rates, or charges for a product or service.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Fee Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Charges a service fee to a customer or counterparty.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Withdrawal Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Decreases funds held in a customer account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Deposit Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Increases funds held by the bank on behalf of a customer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transfers funds from one party to another.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Clearing Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Matches and confirms obligations between parties before final settlement.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Finalizes obligations by exchanging funds or assets.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Repayment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Reduces outstanding principal and/or interest on a loan or credit.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Records earned or owed interest on financial products.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reconciliation Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Compares balances between systems or parties to identify differences.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Securities Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description: Buys, sells, or transfers financial instruments.
